property.name: Action
property.value: MineSign The Safari Zone is still evolving. Time until next update is... Unown.

property.name: Action
property.value: MineSign The Pokemon don't mind the season changes in this place.

property.name: Action
property.value: MineSign This area is under active development. If you see a missingno, please report it to XanCreations.

property.name: Action
property.value: MineSign Small trees have blocked various paths. Please wait until they've been CUT.
